29. One, who has Durudhura Yoga caused by Venus and Saturn will conduct himself, like an old
man (i.e. so mature), be chief in his race, skilful, dear to women and will have plenty of
money. He will be honoured by the king and gather abundant wealth.
30. LUNAR YOGAS FROM THE SUN. If the Moon is in an Angle from the Sun, little effects will
be felt in regard to money, wisdom, skill, learning and modesty. These are medium, if the
Moon be in Panaphara (i.e. 2nd 5th, 8th and 11th) and exceedingly good in Apoklima (i.e. 3rd,
6th. 9th and 12th).
31. MOON IN VISIBLE AND INVISIBLE HALVES. In the case of a night birth, if the Moon is with
Parivesha (halo) and be declining in the invisible half of the Zodiac (i.e. being posited
between Lagna Bhava Madhya and the center of the descendant7th House), or declining
Moon in day time be in the visible half (i.e.
